cards.product_type: slim-fit jersey with manga-inspired graphic print
cards.vibe_description: Neon hues illuminate the Tokyo streets, as the city's electric nightlife pulses through the veins of its inhabitants, the royal blue and red accents on this jersey a testament to the era's vibrant, anime-inspired aesthetic.

cards.product_type: relaxed-fit T-shirt with anime-inspired graphic print
cards.vibe_description: In the city's quieter moments, the nostalgia of Showa-era Tokyo lingers, its retro-futuristic charm seeping into the relaxed silhouettes and comic strip prints that now populate the modern streets, a convergence of past and present.

As dusk falls over the city, the urban landscape transforms, the bold graphics and bright hues of this oversized tee a reflection of the metropolis's unrelenting energy, its cityscape cool aesthetic a siren call to those who inhabit its streets.
